title: Reply with exactly: explorer OK
summary_text: merge now 1. PR checks are green (`fast-gate`, `scan`, `actionlint`, `Codex Review`, canary state is non-blocking), and GitHub reports `mergeStateStatus: CLEAN`. 2. No requested-change or blocking review was present in fetched PR metadata/comments; only non-blocking automated comments were observed. 3. Core touched runtime-orchestration scripts appear internally consistent (claim/tmux/scheduler/reconciler flows plus status surface changes), with no evident hard regressions surfaced from local diff-level review. Residual risk: - CI now depends on Python `yaml` parsing in gate workflow; if runtime images miss `PyYAML`, validation can fail for environmental reasons. - A small coverage drop exists from removed x-auto-specific checks in this branch; this is not a logic break but lowers guardrails for those paths. - Handoff path behavior is now more strict around manifest detection and can fail noisily if external handoff adapters are missing or partially provisioned.
